text:
ありがとう！
うわー、これがウワサの剣刃か。
うん、確かにこれなら何でも切れそう。

あの食材を千切りにして……
いやいやみじん切りのほうが……？
……ああっと、ごめんなさい！

料理のことは、きちんと厨房で
考えればいいもんね。
それより、お礼、お礼っと。

いつもいつもありがとう！
また

Thank you so much! Wow, this seems
like it could cut you just by looking at it!
This will definitely do the job.

Now lets see, should I start by slicing, dicing,
or mincing...? Oh, don't mind me!

I should really leave my cooking brain back in
the kitchen. Here, let me get your reward for
you before I get lost in my next dish.
Thanks as always! Be sure to stop by again!
